metadata.title:
GURLEY FL YNN SENDS


BID TO BILL SHANNON

pages.raw_text:
The cat is out of the sack The
whole thing might as we'll be ex-
posed to the light now. In few
words, that dadgasted suspicion
about Bill Shannon has been con-
firmed. That patrolman who is
not known for his love for the |.
w. WIS has received a communica-
ton from Elizabeth Gurley Flynn
Jones, the I. w. w. leader who on
one occasion, it is said, called him
gorilla"


Mr.. Shannon openly admits that
he received the message from the
woman leader. He even showed it
to number of the officers at the
police headquarters this morning. 1t
is an invitation to hear - Gurley
Flynn make a speech at the Apollo
hall tonight at 8 O'Clock. Business
men, ministers, editors, lawyers,
teachers and other prominent citi-
zens have been invited to the num-
Der of 800, according to the COM
munication received by the police
man. Her subject tonight will be
THE other side of an unsettled
question: -s~e
